title: conyza leucantha
intro: Conyza leucantha, also known as White Fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Conyza leucantha include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Conyza leucantha can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
